from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs/mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out-0.log')

print('lines=' + str(len(lines)))

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs/mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-error-0.log')
lines = p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines() if p.exists() else []
print('err_lines=' + str(len(lines)))
for ln in lines[-30:]:
    print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
PY
